mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appeals WHERE courier_id = #{courierId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appeals (rating_id, violation_id, courier_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{ratingId}, #{violationId}, #{courierId}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE appeals SET status = #{status}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewer_comment = #{reviewerComment}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeals WHERE courier_id = #{courierId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeals WHERE status = #{status}
